_meta.description: Template name -> Klaviyo ID registry. Every entry tagged with language. See LANGUAGE-SEPARATION.md.

welcome_flow_craft_pass_2026_04_18.summary: A+ craft pass on Welcome W1-W5 (AR). Pre-pass grade B-/75. Target A+/90+. Addresses 15 issues from 2-pass design+copy review.

welcome-1-final.html: WHOLESALE REWRITE: MSA formal -> Hijazi peer-register founder voice (highest-CTR pattern per 180d data: 0.43-0.45%).
New H1 'صاحبتي،' replaces 'كودكِ: WELCOME10'. Added 'رسالة من سهام · مؤسِّسة' eyebrow.
Added '٥ دقائق' drumbeat (repeats in W2, W4, W5).
New P.S. teases W2 (primes next open) instead of explaining gift.
CTA copy changed 'أستخدم كودي' -> 'اختاري لونكِ' (more specific intent, ties to W3).
CTA destination changed from /collections/best-sellers -> /collections/clip-in-extensions (matches 'اختاري لونكِ' intent).
Added code-card gift tagline 'تُفاجئكِ عند الطلب' (creates curiosity without misnaming).
welcome-2-final.html: Surfaced size guide (40/50cm) from buried P.S. into body paragraph 2.
New eyebrow '٣ من ٤ يختارنه' stacks above H1.
P.S. rewritten to tease W3 (color guide) instead of repeating body size info.
Preview text refreshed to match new tease.
welcome-3-final.html: Fixed +٢٢ color claim vs 12-swatch image mismatch: copy now frames image as '١٢ الأكثر طلباً من أصل +٢٢'.
WhatsApp CTA: added TODO marker (966XXXXXXXXX) + inline comment for stylist number before send.
Added Tamara/Tabby installments line (3 installments, no interest) below CTA.
P.S. rewritten to tease W4 ('بأريكِ الفرق في ٥ دقائق').
welcome-4-final.html: Fixed CTA BUG: hero-link + button both pointed to PDP /#reviews anchor (user lands on review section, not shop). Now both point to /discount/WELCOME10?redirect=%2Fproducts%2Fclip-in-extensions-9-pieces (direct-to-product with discount auto-applied).
CTA copy 'أقرأ التقييمات' -> 'أبغى هذي الكثافة' (intent matches destination and testimonial hook).
welcome-5-final.html: Killed hardcoded weekday: 'بعد يوم الخميس' -> 'بعد ٤٨ ساعة' (was broken in perpetual flow).

Eliminated title tautology: H1 differentiated from eyebrow + subject. Eyebrow still 'آخر فرصة · ٤٨ ساعة'. H1 now 'قبل ما يختفي WELCOME10'. Subhead moved to subtitle role: 'أكثر ٥ أسئلة نسمعها · جوابنا بدون مبالغة'.
Added referral P.S. ('أرسلي كودكِ لصاحبتكِ') as final hook at end of flow (no SAR amount — framed as founder gift).
HTML <title> updated to match new H1.
all_5_templates: Added footer progress indicator (●●○○○ · ٢ من ٥) to show subscriber their position in flow.

defaults_locked_in.founder_title: شريكة مؤسِّسة (feminine, matches registry.founder_identity.ar.title; supersedes the masculine 'شريك مؤسس' that was in VOICE-PROFILE-AR.md and all 5 templates pre-pass)
defaults_locked_in.free_gift_framing: 'تُفاجئكِ عند الطلب' — mystery framing (no specific name) because actual welcome-gift SKU unknown. User can rename in all 5 code cards via single find/replace when confirmed.
defaults_locked_in.whatsapp_number_w3: Placeholder 966XXXXXXXXX + HTML comment TODO. Must be swapped before send.
defaults_locked_in.installments: Tamara + Tabby mentioned in W3 only (not every email, to avoid repetition)
defaults_locked_in.referral_amount: Not specified. 'هديّة شكر منّي شخصياً' framing. Switch to SAR amount if real referral reward is set up.

still_open: Confirm real WhatsApp stylist number and swap in W3
Confirm actual welcome-gift SKU and swap 'تُفاجئكِ عند الطلب' for named gift across 5 code cards if preferred
Archetype-b and archetype-c of W1 left untouched — if W1-final is the canonical, consider deleting archetypes to avoid confusion
VOICE-PROFILE-AR.md still lists sign-off as masculine 'شريك مؤسس' — reconcile with registry feminine or explicitly note the spelling standardization
Welcome flow in Klaviyo (RpUXJv) has 4 nodes per FLOW-MAP; confirm it has a 5th node or adjust W5 -> W4 consolidation
welcome_flow_craft_pass_2026_04_18.expected_lift: W1 founder-voice rewrite = highest. 180d AR data shows founder-letter subject pattern = 0.43-0.45% CTR (top of cohort). Welcome #1 is 100% open-rate-anchor of the flow — all downstream CTR depends on it.

segmentation_audit_2026_04_16.summary: Full-account audit of 63 segments. Found 3 real bugs + fixed. Post-fix quality: 5/5 coverage, 5/5 correctness, 5/5 hygiene.
fixes_applied: DELETED YaDY3x (leaked __PROBE_A__ Items contains اكستنشن, count=0, created same day, never cleaned up)
RENAMED XUf7Wy -> 'AM | Exclude | Bots (pattern)' (regex on email/first name)
RENAMED Wu33h2 -> 'AM | Exclude | Bots (behavioral)' (zero opens + received emails)

PATCHED RraB6N Clean #4: swapped dead metric Xf2suC (API Placed Order, no events since 2024-07-18) -> RFkPcF (Shopify Placed Order, active). Also swapped dead VsAyY9 (API Started Checkout) -> UDbxB2 (Shopify Checkout Started). Count dropped 2859 -> 2719 (140 real Shopify buyers correctly excluded).

dead_metrics_to_avoid.Xf2suC: API Placed Order — 1 seed event 2024-07-18, nothing since. Never use in segment conditions.
dead_metrics_to_avoid.XFdah2: Celery Placed Order — legacy integration, abandoned.
dead_metrics_to_avoid.VsAyY9: API Started Checkout — 1 seed event 2024-07-18, nothing since.
dead_metrics_to_avoid.VU7cyR: API Active on Site — parallel to U2auYp; check before using.

live_shopify_metrics_canonical.ordered_product: XFDwkK (flat per-line-item fields: ProductID, SKU, Name, Vendor — metric_filters work)

unengaged_canonical_policy.XBK6Hv: 90d window variant (11178) — RETAINED for re-engagement campaigns, NOT suppression
unengaged_canonical_policy.rationale: Three variants exist because different send contexts need different thresholds. Active campaigns use R7n5YH+XDzbbr; re-engagement flows use XBK6Hv.

engaged_tier_policy.AM_Engaged_30D_60D: TRNF9C / VrThHy — 5-signal + consent gate. Tighter. Use for high-value / VIP sends.
engaged_tier_policy.AI_Engaged_30_60_Days: RS4wxS / UkesRj — 2-signal (open OR click). Broader. Use for mass promo sends (~7325 on 60d).
engaged_tier_policy.rule: Not duplicates, complementary tiers. AI is the default for campaigns. AM is the conservative variant.

en._note: KEEP LIVE per founder directive 2026-04-16 — do NOT archive. Rewrite to EN voice when EN pattern library has sufficient confidence.

shared._vip_note: vip promoted to YzbgxD (AI-built 2026-04-13: 3+ orders + CLV>2000). Legacy SdJBtU kept for historical reference only; do not use for new sends.

ai_built_2026_04_14._note: AI-built segments. None match Ponytail Launch 1:1 — UkesRj (Engaged 60d) is reused as composition primitive. At-Risk useful for future win-back. VIP + HighAOV reserved for future cross-sell.

ar.buyers_365d_purpose: Annual reactivation · Ramadan/Eid/year-end promos · broad re-engagement
ar.one_time_buyers_60d_plus_definition: $locale_language=ar AND Placed Order count alltime =1 AND Placed Order count last 60d =0
ar.engaged_non_buyers_definition: $locale_language=ar AND (Opened|Clicked in last 90d) AND Placed Order count alltime =0
ar.lapsed_buyers_180d_definition: $locale_language=ar AND Placed Order count alltime ≥1 AND Placed Order count last 180d =0
ar._build_note: All AR segments use $locale_language='ar' custom property. Suppression stack applied at campaign send layer.

en._build_note: All EN segments use $locale_language='en' custom property. Mirror of AR lifecycle set. Counts smaller because Zen Hair is predominantly Arabic audience (528 total EN profiles vs 21k+ AR).

lifetime_value.low_definition: Placed Order sum alltime >0 AND <500 SAR
lifetime_value.mid_definition: Placed Order sum alltime ≥500 AND <2000 SAR
lifetime_value._note: VjjgUC was broken (used dead metric Xf2suC) — PATCHed 2026-04-16 to use RFkPcF sum. LV tiers sum to 5,068 = total lifetime buyers in account.

_meta.note: Subscriber-source cohorts based on which list drove signup. Uses profile-group-membership (is_member=true, group_ids=[...]) — do NOT include timeframe_filter, it is rejected by the API. Within one condition_group, multiple list-membership conditions are OR'd.

RP27Cc.name: SMS Subscribers
RP27Cc.role: DEAD — SMS moved to different tool

organic_signup.name: Source | Organic Site Signup
organic_signup.definition: member of list Ri2yYm (Wellcome | Sign up form)
organic_signup.purpose: Dominant organic pool — came to site, opted in via popup. Clean pre-purchase intent. Target for welcome series, educational content, first-order nudges.

free_sample_funnel.name: Source | Free Sample Funnel
free_sample_funnel.definition: member of XVHa6u OR WXdiNn OR TZgyzu (OR'd)
free_sample_funnel.purpose: Incentive-driven signups (free sample promise). More cautious buyers. Target with shipping nudges, sample-to-purchase conversion, try-now urgency.

paid_funnel_ghl.name: Source | Paid Funnel (GHL)
paid_funnel_ghl.definition: member of SZ7nKa OR Sq7Aex (GoHighLevel funnels, OR'd)
paid_funnel_ghl.purpose: Paid-ads acquired cohort. High CAC — deserves careful nurture to justify acquisition cost. Target for premium content, stronger nurture sequences.

_meta.property_note: $country is a Klaviyo auto-populated custom property (like $locale_language). Use via profile-property condition with full English country name. The built-in `location.country` attribute is NOT filterable in segment definitions — `profile-region` condition type is for Klaviyo data-residency regions, not country filtering.

distribution_snapshot_2026_04_16._notes: 80% Saudi confirms founder 'predominantly Saudi audience'. Qatar surprisingly #3. Oman not individually probed (~718 per GCC ex-KSA math).

ksa.name: Geo | KSA (Saudi Arabia)
ksa.purpose: Hero market. Use for Saudi-specific promos, Ramadan/Eid/Saudi National Day, SAR pricing, Saudi shipping zone. 80% of audience.

gcc_ex_ksa.name: Geo | GCC ex-KSA
gcc_ex_ksa.definition: $country equals UAE OR Kuwait OR Bahrain OR Qatar OR Oman (OR'd in single condition_group)
gcc_ex_ksa.purpose: Secondary GCC markets. Different shipping, VAT, currency handling. Often bilingual (AR+EN) audience. Use for cross-border promos.

geography._row_note: Rest-of-World (UK, US, EU, Egypt, Jordan, etc.) not built as a dedicated segment — compose at campaign send time via exclusion of ksa + gcc_ex_ksa.

_meta.purpose: Per-product buyer cohorts for ty-6 cross-sell, win-back, product-launch targeting
_meta.api_note: metric_filters on ProductID (flat scalar) works. metric_filters on Items (array) does NOT work — Klaviyo segment engine cannot traverse arrays. Always use XFDwkK (per-line-item event) for product filtering, never RFkPcF (per-order event with Items array).

bought_ponytail.name: AR | Bought Ponytail
bought_ponytail.purpose: Exclusion set for AR ty-6 ponytail cross-sell

bought_ponytail.name: EN | Bought Ponytail
bought_ponytail.purpose: Exclusion set for EN ty-6 ponytail cross-sell

segments_needed._status_2026_04_16: RESOLVED. AR + EN buyers 90d built via POST /api/segments at IDs US9JzM + W3yztD. Engagement gate + suppression stack intentionally dropped (applied at campaign send time instead).
_api_truth_learned_2026_04_16: Klaviyo Segment API accepts profile-property filters on custom properties like properties['$locale_language']. WmJkqU proves this works; $locale_language is auto-populated by Klaviyo alongside the built-in `locale` attribute.
Conditions WITHIN the same condition_group are OR'd. Condition GROUPS (top-level) are AND'd. Forgetting this cost us one iteration (UaJFDd/RKhKw7 returned impossible counts).
Built-in `locale` attribute is NOT a valid segment-condition property — must use properties['$locale_language'] instead.

profile-group-membership accepts only LIST IDs, not segment IDs. UkesRj and suppression segments still cannot be referenced as primitives — this is a real limit, but a non-issue once we moved suppression to the campaign layer.

resolved_approach.purchase_filter: profile-metric RFkPcF, measurement:count, operator:greater-than 0, timeframe:in-the-last 90 day
resolved_approach.suppression: Applied via Klaviyo campaign 'Excluded audience' (8-segment stack from registry.suppression_stack), NOT in segment definition
resolved_approach.engagement_gate: Dropped — buyers in last 90d are de facto engaged; matches T4djTX pattern

audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.Ri2yYm: Wellcome | Sign up form — 17,170 profiles (main subscriber pool, mixed AR/EN)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.UZL6as: AM | Arabic | Squeeze Page — 0 profiles (previously assumed primary AR list, actually empty)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.Ufa2TB: AM | English | Squeeze Page — 0 profiles (previously assumed primary EN list, actually empty)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.UkesRj: Engaged 60d segment — 7,325 profiles (~98% Arabic locale per 100-profile sample)
audience_primitives_ground_truth_2026_04.WmJkqU: AM | English Profiles segment — 528 profiles (usable as EN primitive in UI builds)

segments_needed.placed_order_canonical_metric: RFkPcF (Shopify integration) — active as of 2026-04-16, latest event same day. Ignore XFdah2 (Celery) and Xf2suC (API) for segment conditions — no recent events.

ar.buyers_90d_BUILT.definition: properties['$locale_language'] equals 'ar' AND Placed Order (RFkPcF) count >0 in last 90 days
ar.buyers_90d_BUILT.purpose: Ponytail Launch AR arm + future AR broadcasts

en.buyers_90d_BUILT.definition: properties['$locale_language'] equals 'en' AND Placed Order (RFkPcF) count >0 in last 90 days
en.buyers_90d_BUILT.purpose: Ponytail Launch EN arm + future EN broadcasts

suppression_stack_note: XDzbbr (AI | Exclude | Never Engaged) added 2026-04-16 per founder approval. Stricter than R7n5YH/RQvExN: 10+ received + 0 opens/clicks alltime.

ponytail-launch-ar.purpose: Ponytail Launch AR arm of language A/B

ponytail-launch-en.purpose: Ponytail Launch EN arm of language A/B
